experimental_estimate.justification: Each biochar config requires: 1 day pyrolysis + 1 day characterization (BET, FTIR, XRD, SEM) + 2 days batch adsorption (4 metals + CO2) + 1 day analysis = ~5 days minimum

reproducibility_note: All results are fully reproducible using the provided dataset (biochar_dataset_1047pts.csv) and the random seed = 42. Running the Python code with identical library versions will produce identical numerical results.
